notes: OCHA reported that a baby daughter was among those killed in the Al Mawasi airstrike; no name was provided.
OCHA reported that a mother was killed in the Al Mawasi airstrike; no name was provided.
OCHA reported that a fifth-grade child died from injuries sustained in an airstrike near a temporary education learning space; no name was provided.

verification_status: OCHA reported that a 17-year-old girl was killed on her way to sit for a high school exam; no name was provided.

notes: OCHA reported that a Bedouin household of eight people included four children and three women; no individual names were provided.
OCHA reported approximately 240 patients with end-stage kidney disease were affected by haemodialysis service reduction at Al Shifa Hospital; no individual names provided.
ICRC reported that over 7,000 children received nutritional supplements in Al Obeid food assistance program; no individual names provided.
ICRC reported that over 850 weapon-wounded patients were treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital; no individual identities provided.
ICRC humanitarian staff involved in first RED aircraft operations establishing air corridor between Port Sudan and Khartoum; no individual names provided.
